headline: Apprehend the New Pegassi Ignus Pursuit Law Enforcement Vehicle
quickTake: NEW DLC: The Kortz Center Heist is live — plan the art heist from a Mansion Art Studio
GTA$1,000,000 discount on the Art Studio expansion for the Mansion
Free Vault Keypad upgrade for the Art Studio
Access to a special Primary Target Painting : Guin's The Outcome of Endeavour
Free Kortz Center Sculpture to decorate your Mansion grounds

sections.title: New DLC: The Kortz Center Heist

items.label: Hosting the heist? Buy a Mansion via Dynasty 8 — Tongva Estate, Vinewood Residence or Richman Villa, from GTA$11.5M
Add the Art Studio expansion (GTA$4.7M — as low as GTA$2.7M with the Elitist and GTA+ discounts) to unlock the heist planning board
Run The Kortz Center Heist (solo or up to 4 players) — three new paintings rotate every week, so it repeats as a money-maker
No mansion? Join a friend's Kortz Center Heist crew — only the host needs the property
GTA$1,000,000 discount on the Art Studio expansion for the Mansion
Free Vault Keypad upgrade for the Art Studio
Access to a special Primary Target Painting : Guin's The Outcome of Endeavour
Free Kortz Center Sculpture to decorate your Mansion grounds
Free Annihilator Stealth helicopter, available to claim from Warstock Cache & Carry
Chameleon Paints - 50% off (PS5, XBOX Series X|S, and PC [Enhanced])
